However, adding flavoring agents might help mitigate any unpleasant odor during preparation, which could enhance overall user experience despite not directly affecting the physical integrity of the cast. Nonetheless, given our primary goal is ensuring proper mixing and dissolution of silicones, chloroform remains the most relevant tool here. Answer choice: B.
